partner.question: Want your clinic or service listed here?

adopt.title: Adopt
adopt.description: Discover trusted resources and practical guidance for finding pets and adoption opportunities throughout Europe.

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.description: Browse a growing directory of veterinarians, clinics, and pet wellness services near your destination.

travelLegal.title: Travel & Legal
travelLegal.description: Learn how the EU pet passport works, which documents you need, and how to comply with local regulations.

home.inlineFooter: Connecting pets and families across Europe.

directory.title: Directory
directory.intro: Useful resources for pet travel and paperwork, filtered by national or international scope.
directory.seoTitle: Pet Services and Care in Spain and Internationally
directory.seoDescription: At The Pet Bridge, we help you find the best resources. From dog boarding in Madrid and Barcelona to reliable pet travel insurance, our directory includes 24h veterinary hospitals and trusted caregivers so you can travel across Europe with confidence.

resources.title: Barkibu (Insurance)
resources.description: One of Spain's highest-rated pet insurance providers, with comprehensive health and accident coverage.

resources.title: Rover
resources.description: Find trusted pet sitters and walkers near you through a leading pet care platform.

resources.title: Retiro Veterinary Hospital (24h)
resources.description: 24-hour emergency veterinary care in central Madrid with experienced specialists.

resources.title: Feliway / Adaptil
resources.description: Leading pet wellbeing products designed to reduce stress in cats and dogs.

resources.title: Vive Pet Resort
resources.description: Premium pet resort in Madrid offering daycare, boarding, and pool facilities.

resources.title: Dondersteen Resort
resources.description: Premium dog hotel in Barcelona with 10,000m2 of open outdoor areas.

resources.title: IATI Escapadas
resources.description: Travel insurance with dedicated pet coverage for trips across Spain and Europe.

resources.title: Heymondo
resources.description: International travel insurance including veterinary assistance coverage.
